summary: Project involves a web app with a proxy provider configuration, currently being set to google.com.
architectural_notes: Proxy provider is set to google.com

existing_features.title: Replace the current proxy provider base URL (allorigins.win) with google.com as the CORS proxy provider in useTabs.ts, updating all proxy URL generation logic to use google.com instead.
Update all hardcoded proxy provider references in HomeSearch.tsx and TabContent.tsx to use google.com instead of allorigins.win, ensuring consistency across all proxy-related UI and logic.
